revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{神社 |名称 = 村上神社 |画像 = |所在地 = [[岐阜県]][[各務原市]][[那加長塚町]]1丁目64番地 |位置 = |祭神 = [[イワナガヒメ|石長比女神]] |社格 = [[金幣社|白幣社]]<ref name="手力雄神社">美濃国那加総社手力雄神社参拝の栞</ref>・旧村社 |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''村上神社'''（むらかみじんじゃ）…」
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 村上神社 |画像 = |所在地 = [[岐阜県]][[各務原市]][[那加長塚町]]1丁目64番地 |位置 = |祭神 = [[イワナガヒメ|石長比女神]] |社格 = [[金幣社|白幣社]]<ref name="手力雄神社">美濃国那加総社手力雄神社参拝の栞</ref>・旧村社 |創建 = 不詳 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = }}
'''村上神社'''（むらかみじんじゃ）は、[[岐阜県]][[各務原市]][[那加長塚町]]に鎮座する[[神社]]。
== 概要 == [[各務原市]][[那加長塚町]]（旧・[[各務郡]]長塚村）の産土神であり、[[那加町|那加地区]]の総社である[[手力雄神社 (各務原市)|手力雄神社]]の西、約300m（徒歩約5分）に鎮座する。
創建時期は不詳。[[1934年]]（昭和9年）に村社に指定される。
境内は露出岩盤が多くあり、形状が[[ドンコ|ドンコツ]]に似ている岩（ドンコツ岩）は[[山神]]としているなど、一部の岩は信仰の対象となっている。
神社の名は「村上神社」であるが、社額や門柱に記されている神社名は「村神神社」である。
== 祭神 == * [[イワナガヒメ|石長比女神]]
== 境内社 == * 秋葉神社
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
== 外部リンク == * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=766&shrname=%E2%98%85%E6%9D%91%E4%B8%8A%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E2%98%85 村上神社（岐阜県神社庁）]
{{shinto-stub}} {{デフォルトソート:むらかみかかみかはらしなかなかつか}} [[Category:岐阜県の神社]] [[Category:各務原市の建築物]] [[Category:各務原市の歴史]] [[Category:岐阜県の旧村社]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:村上神社 (各務原市那加長塚町)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Murakami Shrine |image = {{Image Needed|cat=Kakamigahara City}} |location = [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]][[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]]{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|qq=|1=Nakachozukacho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131870104}}1-chome 64 |position = |enshrined_deity = [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime]] |shrine_Rank = {{ill|Kinpeisha|ja|金幣社|lt=Hakuhesha|lt_ja=白幣社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinpeisha|qq=|1=Kinpei-sha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929592}}<ref name="Shiterikyo Shrine">Pilgrimage Guide of the Shiterikyo Shrine, the Chief Shrine of Naka in Mino Province</ref>・Former Village Shrine |founding = Unknown |main_hall = |alternative_name = |fuda = |annual_festival = |religious_services = }}
'''Murakami Shrine''' (村上神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]] located in [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]][[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]]{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|qq=|1=Nakachozukacho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131870104}}.
== Overview == [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]]{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|qq=|1=Nakachozukacho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131870104}} (formerly ({{ill|Kakami District|ja|各務郡|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakami District|qq=|1=Kakami district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11412369}} Nagatsuka Village)) is the tutelary deity of the area and is enshrined approximately 300 m (about 5 minutes on foot) to the west of {{ill|Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|lt=Shiterikyo Shrine|lt_ja=手力雄神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=|1=Tejikarao- Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496922}}, the head shrine of the {{ill|Naka Town|ja|那加町|lt=Naka Area|lt_ja=那加地区|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Town|qq=|1=Naka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642720}}. The founding date is unknown. In [[:en:1934|1934]] (Showa 9), it was designated as a village shrine. The shrine precincts contain many exposed bedrocks, and some of the rocks—for example, one whose shape resembles [[:en:Dark sleeper|Donkotsu]] and is revered as a {{ill|Mountain Deity|ja|山神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mountain Deity|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山の神|1=Yama-no-Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839254}}—serve as objects of worship. Although the shrine is named “Murakami Shrine” (村上神社), the name inscribed on the shrine plaque and gate posts is “Murakami Shrine” (村神神社).
== Enshrined Deity == * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime]] [[ja:村上神社_(各務原市那加長塚町)]]
== Sub-Shrines == * {{ill|Akiba Shrine|ja|秋葉神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiba Shrine|qq=}}
== Major Religious Events == * February – Prayer for a Good Year Festival * June – Rice-Planting Festival * September – Annual Festival * December – Niiname-sai
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=766&shrname=%E2%98%85%E6%9D%91%E4%B8%8A%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E2%98%85 Murakami Shrine (Gifu Prefecture Shrine Office)]

== Overview == [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]]{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|1=Nakachozukacho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131870104}} (formerly ({{ill|Kakami District|ja|各務郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakami District|1=Kakami district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11412369}} Nagatsuka Village)) is the tutelary deity of the area and is enshrined approximately 300 m (about 5 minutes on foot) to the west of {{ill|Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|lt=Shiterikyo Shrine|lt_ja=手力雄神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|1=Tejikarao- Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496922}}, the head shrine of the {{ill|Naka Town|ja|那加町|lt=Naka Area|lt_ja=那加地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Town|1=Naka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642720}}. The founding date is unknown. In [[:en:1934|1934]] (Showa 9), it was designated as a village shrine. The shrine precincts contain many exposed bedrocks, and some of the rocks—for example, one whose shape resembles [[:en:Dark sleeper|Donkotsu]] and is revered as a {{ill|Mountain Deity|ja|山神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mountain Deity|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山の神|1=Yama-no-Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839254}}—serve as objects of worship. Although the shrine is named “Murakami Shrine” (村上神社), the name inscribed on the shrine plaque and gate posts is “Murakami Shrine” (村神神社).
== Enshrined Deity == * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime]] [[ja:村上神社_(各務原市那加長塚町)]]
== Sub-Shrines == * {{ill|Akiba Shrine|ja|秋葉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiba Shrine|qq=}}
== Major Religious Events == * February – Prayer for a Good Year Festival * June – Rice-Planting Festival * September – Annual Festival * December – Niiname-sai
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=766&shrname=%E2%98%85%E6%9D%91%E4%B8%8A%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E2%98%85 Murakami Shrine (Gifu Prefecture Shrine Office)]

Although the shrine is named “Murakami Shrine” (村上神社), the name inscribed on the shrine plaque and gate posts is “Murakami Shrine” (村神神社).
== Enshrined Deity == * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime]] [[ja:村上神社_(各務原市那加長塚町)]]
== Sub-Shrines == * {{ill|Akiba Shrine|ja|秋葉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiba Shrine|qq=}}

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:村上神社 (各務原市那加長塚町)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:村上神社 (各務原市那加長塚町)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:村上神社 (各務原市那加長塚町)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 05:21, 12 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|Wikidata entry (none) Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:21, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Murakami Shrine |image = {{Image Needed|cat=Kakamigahara City}} |location = [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]][[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]]{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|1=Nakachozukacho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131870104}}1-chome 64 |position = |enshrined_deity = [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime]] |shrine_Rank = {{ill|Kinpeisha|ja|金幣社|lt=Hakuhesha|lt_ja=白幣社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinpeisha|1=Kinpei-sha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q119929592}}<ref name="Shiterikyo Shrine">Pilgrimage Guide of the Shiterikyo Shrine, the Chief Shrine of Naka in Mino Province</ref>・Former Village Shrine |founding = Unknown |main_hall = |alternative_name = |fuda = |annual_festival = |religious_services = }}
'''Murakami Shrine''' (村上神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shrine]] located in [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]][[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]]{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|1=Nakachozukacho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131870104}}.
== Overview == [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]]{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|1=Nakachozukacho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131870104}} (formerly ({{ill|Kakami District|ja|各務郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakami District|1=Kakami district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11412369}} Nagatsuka Village)) is the tutelary deity of the area and is enshrined approximately 300 m (about 5 minutes on foot) to the west of {{ill|Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|lt=Shiterikyo Shrine|lt_ja=手力雄神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|1=Tejikarao- Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496922}}, the head shrine of the {{ill|Naka Town|ja|那加町|lt=Naka Area|lt_ja=那加地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Town|1=Naka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642720}}. The founding date is unknown. In [[:en:1934|1934]] (Showa 9), it was designated as a village shrine. The shrine precincts contain many exposed bedrocks, and some of the rocks—for example, one whose shape resembles [[:en:Dark sleeper|Donkotsu]] and is revered as a {{ill|Mountain Deity|ja|山神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mountain Deity|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山の神|1=Yama-no-Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839254}}—serve as objects of worship. Although the shrine is named “Murakami Shrine” (村上神社), the name inscribed on the shrine plaque and gate posts is “Murakami Shrine” (村神神社).
== Enshrined Deity == * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime]] [[ja:村上神社_(各務原市那加長塚町)]]
== Sub-Shrines == * {{ill|Akiba Shrine|ja|秋葉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiba Shrine|qq=}}
== Major Religious Events == * February – Prayer for a Good Year Festival * June – Rice-Planting Festival * September – Annual Festival * December – Niiname-sai
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=766&shrname=%E2%98%85%E6%9D%91%E4%B8%8A%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E2%98%85 Murakami Shrine (Gifu Prefecture Shrine Office)]
{{shinto-stub}}
{{Iwanaga Faith}}

== Overview == [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]]{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|1=Nakachozukacho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131870104}} (formerly ({{ill|Kakami District|ja|各務郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakami District|1=Kakami district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11412369}} Nagatsuka Village)) is the tutelary deity of the area and is enshrined approximately 300 m (about 5 minutes on foot) to the west of {{ill|Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|lt=Shiterikyo Shrine|lt_ja=手力雄神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|1=Tejikarao- Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496922}}, the head shrine of the {{ill|Naka Town|ja|那加町|lt=Naka Area|lt_ja=那加地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Town|1=Naka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642720}}. The founding date is unknown. In [[:en:1934|1934]] (Showa 9), it was designated as a village shrine. The shrine precincts contain many exposed bedrocks, and some of the rocks—for example, one whose shape resembles [[:en:Dark sleeper|Donkotsu]] and is revered as a {{ill|Mountain Deity|ja|山神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mountain Deity|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山の神|1=Yama-no-Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839254}}—serve as objects of worship. Although the shrine is named “Murakami Shrine” (村上神社), the name inscribed on the shrine plaque and gate posts is “Murakami Shrine” (村神神社).
== Enshrined Deity == * [[:en:Iwanaga-hime|Iwanagahime]] [[ja:村上神社_(各務原市那加長塚町)]]
== Sub-Shrines == * {{ill|Akiba Shrine|ja|秋葉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiba Shrine|qq=}}
== Major Religious Events == * February – Prayer for a Good Year Festival * June – Rice-Planting Festival * September – Annual Festival * December – Niiname-sai
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=766&shrname=%E2%98%85%E6%9D%91%E4%B8%8A%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E2%98%85 Murakami Shrine (Gifu Prefecture Shrine Office)]
{{shinto-stub}}
{{Iwanaga Faith}}

'''Murakami Shrine''' (村上神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shrine}} located in {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|Kakamigahara|en|Kakamigahara|WD=Q641491|lt=Kakamigahara City}}{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|1=Nakachozukacho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131870104}}.
== Overview == {{ill|Kakamigahara|en|Kakamigahara|WD=Q641491|lt=Kakamigahara City}}{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|1=Nakachozukacho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131870104}} (formerly ({{ill|Kakami District|ja|各務郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakami District|1=Kakami district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11412369}} Nagatsuka Village)) is the tutelary deity of the area and is enshrined approximately 300 m (about 5 minutes on foot) to the west of {{ill|Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|lt=Shiterikyo Shrine|lt_ja=手力雄神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|1=Tejikarao- Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496922}}, the head shrine of the {{ill|Naka Town|ja|那加町|lt=Naka Area|lt_ja=那加地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Town|1=Naka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642720}}. The founding date is unknown. In {{ill|1934|en|1934|WD=Q18714|lt=1934}} (Showa 9), it was designated as a village shrine. The shrine precincts contain many exposed bedrocks, and some of the rocks—for example, one whose shape resembles {{ill|Dark sleeper|en|Dark sleeper|WD=Q1044404|lt=Donkotsu}} and is revered as a {{ill|Mountain Deity|ja|山神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mountain Deity|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山の神|1=Yama-no-Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839254}}—serve as objects of worship. Although the shrine is named “Murakami Shrine” (村上神社), the name inscribed on the shrine plaque and gate posts is “Murakami Shrine” (村神神社).
== Enshrined Deity == * {{ill|Iwanaga-hime|en|Iwanaga-hime|WD=Q8191705|lt=Iwanagahime}} [[ja:村上神社_(各務原市那加長塚町)]]
== Sub-Shrines == * {{ill|Akiba Shrine|ja|秋葉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiba Shrine|qq=}}
== Major Religious Events == * February – Prayer for a Good Year Festival * June – Rice-Planting Festival * September – Annual Festival * December – Niiname-sai
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=766&shrname=%E2%98%85%E6%9D%91%E4%B8%8A%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E2%98%85 Murakami Shrine (Gifu Prefecture Shrine Office)]
{{shinto-stub}}
{{Iwanaga Faith}}

== Overview == {{ill|Kakamigahara|en|Kakamigahara|WD=Q641491|lt=Kakamigahara City}}{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|1=Nakachozukacho|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q131870104}} (formerly ({{ill|Kakami District|ja|各務郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakami District|1=Kakami district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11412369}} Nagatsuka Village)) is the tutelary deity of the area and is enshrined approximately 300 m (about 5 minutes on foot) to the west of {{ill|Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|lt=Shiterikyo Shrine|lt_ja=手力雄神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|1=Tejikarao- Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496922}}, the head shrine of the {{ill|Naka Town|ja|那加町|lt=Naka Area|lt_ja=那加地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Town|1=Naka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11642720}}. The founding date is unknown. In {{ill|1934|en|1934|WD=Q18714|lt=1934}} (Showa 9), it was designated as a village shrine. The shrine precincts contain many exposed bedrocks, and some of the rocks—for example, one whose shape resembles {{ill|Dark sleeper|en|Dark sleeper|WD=Q1044404|lt=Donkotsu}} and is revered as a {{ill|Mountain Deity|ja|山神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mountain Deity|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山の神|1=Yama-no-Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q839254}}—serve as objects of worship. Although the shrine is named “Murakami Shrine” (村上神社), the name inscribed on the shrine plaque and gate posts is “Murakami Shrine” (村神神社).
== Enshrined Deity == * {{ill|Iwanaga-hime|en|Iwanaga-hime|WD=Q8191705|lt=Iwanagahime}} [[ja:村上神社_(各務原市那加長塚町)]]
== Sub-Shrines == * {{ill|Akiba Shrine|ja|秋葉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiba Shrine|qq=}}
== Major Religious Events == * February – Prayer for a Good Year Festival * June – Rice-Planting Festival * September – Annual Festival * December – Niiname-sai
== Footnotes == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * [https://www.gifu-jinjacho.jp/syosai.php?shrno=766&shrname=%E2%98%85%E6%9D%91%E4%B8%8A%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE%E2%98%85 Murakami Shrine (Gifu Prefecture Shrine Office)]

'''Murakami Shrine''' (村上神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|Kakamigahara|en|Kakamigahara|qid=Q641491|lt=Kakamigahara City|1=Kakamigahara}}{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|1=Q131870104|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q131870104}}.
== Overview == {{ill|Kakamigahara|en|Kakamigahara|qid=Q641491|lt=Kakamigahara City|1=Kakamigahara}}{{ill|Nakachozukacho|ja|那加長塚町|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nakachozukacho|1=Q131870104|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q131870104}} (formerly ({{ill|Kakami District|ja|各務郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakami District|1=Kakami district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11412369}} Nagatsuka Village)) is the tutelary deity of the area and is enshrined approximately 300 m (about 5 minutes on foot) to the west of {{ill|Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|lt=Shiterikyo Shrine|lt_ja=手力雄神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shiterikyo Shrine (Kakamigahara)|1=Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11496922}}, the head shrine of the {{ill|Naka Town|ja|那加町|lt=Naka Area|lt_ja=那加地区|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Town|1=Naka|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11642720}}. The founding date is unknown. In {{ill|1934|en|1934|qid=Q18714|lt=1934|1=1934}} (Showa 9), it was designated as a village shrine. The shrine precincts contain many exposed bedrocks, and some of the rocks—for example, one whose shape resembles {{ill|Dark sleeper|en|Dark sleeper|qid=Q1044404|lt=Donkotsu|1=Dark sleeper}} and is revered as a {{ill|Mountain Deity|ja|山神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mountain Deity|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 山の神|1=Yama-no-Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q839254}}—serve as objects of worship. Although the shrine is named “Murakami Shrine” (村上神社), the name inscribed on the shrine plaque and gate posts is “Murakami Shrine” (村神神社).
== Enshrined Deity == * {{ill|Iwanaga-hime|en|Iwanaga-hime|qid=Q8191705|lt=Iwanagahime|1=Iwanaga-hime}} [[ja:村上神社_(各務原市那加長塚町)]]
== Sub-Shrines == * {{ill|Akiba Shrine|ja|秋葉神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akiba Shrine|qq=}}
